basic_details.job_title: MNSS Rai Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Clerk, Steno Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru School of Sports, Rai (MNSS Rai)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru School of Sports, Rai (MNSS Rai), Sonipat has released a recruitment notification for Non-Teaching Posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for Clerk and Steno-Typist positions on a regular basis.

MNSS Rai Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 Short Notification

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 15-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 04-08-2026

content_sections.heading: MNSS Rai Non Teaching Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: MNSS Rai has announced vacancies for Clerk and Steno-Typist posts. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for MNSS Rai Non Teaching Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualification and skills can apply for different posts. The eligibility details are as follows: Clerk: Candidates having graduation qualification with required computer knowledge as per recruitment rules. Steno-Typist: Candidates having required qualification along with stenography and typing skills.

content_sections.heading: MNSS Rai Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit will be applicable as per MNSS Rai recruitment rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MNSS Rai Non Teaching Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official MNSS Rai website. Open the Recruitment section. Download and read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Register using required details. Fill out the application form correctly. Upload required documents. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the application form for future reference.
